docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $106.56 FILED BY TOLLIVER, BRANDIN AS TO DEFENDANT SIMOTAS, MICHELLE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-10-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00) SERVED JUL-30-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SIMOTAS, MICHELLE
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT SIMOTAS, MICHELLE
ORDER GRANTING REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-10-2018 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO SEP-24-2018 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PLAINTIFF BRANDON TOLLIVER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MICHELLE SIMOTAS IS PRESENT. PARTIES PARTICIPATED IN THE SRL MEDIATION PROGRAM AND HAVE REACHED A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. MATTER DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
ORDER RE: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
